top_signals.title: Japan inflation softens to over four year low, weakening case for BOJ rate hike
top_signals.summary: Core inflation — which strips out prices of fresh food — was lower than the 1.7% expected by economists polled by Reuters and below the 1.8% reading in March.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Trump abruptly postpones AI order after White House infighting
top_signals.summary: President refuses to approve order hours before planned signing due to fears US innovators will lose out to China
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
